sections/hero.name: Section: hero
variants: serif H1 + decorative SVG panel right (boost)
sections/hero.visual: Full-bleed top section (≈70–100vh on SaaS, ≈55–70vh on boutique). Oversized display H1 (text-5xl→7xl) with one accent-coloured span; muted lede beneath; eyebrow above (uppercase-tracked OR numbered '01'). SaaS variants anchor the copy with a product mockup / illustration / device frame; boutique variants are type-only on white or warm paper.
sections/hero.placement: First block under the sticky nav. Copy left-aligned or centered; supporting visual on the right in 12-col splits (7/5, 8/4). The dual-CTA row sits immediately under the lede; an in-hero trust nibble (rating badge, client count, or partner/award logos) sits just below or beside the CTAs.
sections/hero.states: On-load fade / slide-up reveal; product mockups may parallax subtly; CTAs animate per their own button spec.
sections/hero.animation: Staggered on-load reveal: eyebrow → H1 → lede → CTA row slide-up + fade in sequence (~80ms stagger, 500–700ms ease-out); supporting mockup/illustration parallaxes subtly on scroll. soft: spring entrance + mockup float; swiss/editorial/warm: understated, no parallax.
realWorld: Nexova: left copy + 3 claim chips + 5.0★/93 badge
Magic Heidi: centered + Swiss QR-bill invoice mockup + '5,000+ freelancers'
Pilot: copy left + .avif product illustration right + '3,000+ startups' logo strip
Warringsholz: split copy + founder portrait, 'Kompetent. Persönlich. Digital.'
STG Zürich: type-only heritage hero 'Uns vertrauen Generationen. Seit 1906'

designLanguage.editorial: Serif H1, wide whitespace, numbered or tracked eyebrow, text-link / all-caps CTA, optional pull-quote aside.
designLanguage.swiss: Grotesk H1 on faint masked-grid bg, pulse-dot availability badge, two sharp solid CTAs, left-aligned.
designLanguage.soft: Geometric H1, centered stack, rounded pill CTAs, product mockup or illustration, Google-rating badge below.
designLanguage.warm: Warm-paper bg, sharp corners, ink-blue accent span, 8/4 text + rose pull-quote aside, snappy underline CTA.

sections/intro.name: Section: intro
sections/intro.visual: Quiet positioning band: eyebrow + a single large statement (text-3xl→4xl, often part-muted) in a narrow column (max-w-3xl), optionally a row of small icon feature-chips beneath.
sections/intro.placement: Directly after the hero, before services. Centered single column, or a 5/7 split with chips on the wider side. Generous top/bottom padding to act as a breather.
sections/intro.states: Subtle on-scroll reveal; chips may stagger in.
sections/intro.animation: Statement fades + slides up on scroll-into-view; feature-chips stagger in (~60ms each). soft springs; editorial/warm stay subtle.
realWorld: Controva: 'The figures have to add up.' reduced statement

designLanguage.editorial: Serif statement, hairline above/below, lots of air.
designLanguage.soft: Geometric statement + rounded icon feature-chips row.
designLanguage.warm: Ink statement on paper, thin rule, restrained.

sections/services.name: Section: services
variants: 4/8 list + animated detail pane w/ accent bar (uds)
sections/services.visual: The workhorse grid. Cards carry icon + title + 1-line summary + arrow link; CH digital firms add an inline price ('ab CHF 150/Monat'). Soft looks use rounded cards with hover-lift; swiss/editorial use sharp bordered cells; boutiques drop cards for a divided text list.
sections/services.placement: High on the page (slot 4), right after intro. Section header row (eyebrow + H2, optional hint/CTA right) over a 2/3/4-col grid; icons top-center (LPS, Magic Heidi, PMPG) or top-left (bexio, Karbon, Osome). Whole card is usually the click target.
sections/services.states: Hover: border adopts accent OR card lifts with a shadow; arrow link translates right; icon may tint.
sections/services.animation: Grid cards stagger-reveal (translateY 16px + fade, ~60–80ms/card) on first view. Hover: soft = lift + shadow bloom, swiss/editorial = snappy border-colour shift, warm = quick ease-out; arrow link nudges, icon tints.
realWorld: bexio: 4-col, icon top-left, flat with hover-shadow lift, clickable
Magic Heidi: 3-col, icon top, flat, clickable
Gruber Renger: 3-col photo cards, whole-card clickable 'Zum Rechnungswesen'
Controva: no cards — divided text list of 7 services
Nexova: 6 service cards each with 'ab CHF X' price

designLanguage.editorial: Bordered divided tiles (divide-x/divide-y hairlines), icon-in-box, uppercase title, arrow link.
designLanguage.swiss: Sharp flat cards or 2 large feature pillars with CheckCircle checklist + outline CTA.
designLanguage.soft: Rounded-2xl cards, soft shadow, hover-lift, vibrant icon chips, clickable to detail.
designLanguage.warm: Sharp hairline cards on paper, or a sidebar selector + animated detail pane with accent bar.

sections/stats.name: Section: stats
sections/stats.visual: Big display numbers (text-4xl→6xl) with a mono/uppercase label and short caption. Either a bordered divided row or a tinted panel with a 2×2 metric grid.
sections/stats.placement: Mid-page, often paired with about/testimonials as a credibility beat, or as a thin band between two larger sections. 3 or 4 cells across.
sections/stats.animation: Numbers count-up from 0 on scroll-into-view (~1–1.2s ease-out); cells fade-up staggered.
realWorld: Divisia (CH baseline): 20+ years · 500+ mandates · 1 language · ZH

designLanguage.warm: Label→value telemetry card with accent bar.

sections/values.name: Section: values
sections/values.visual: 4–6 working-principle pillars: a bullet dot or small icon, a short H4, and one line of body. Read as a calm, scannable band.
sections/values.placement: After services (slot 5). 3-col with vertical hairline dividers, or a 2×2/3×2 grid; top/bottom bordered band, centered eyebrow.
sections/values.animation: Pillars stagger-reveal; accent bars grow width (scaleX 0→1) on entrance.
realWorld: Recurring CH four: 100% digital · transparente Preise · persönliche Betreuung · vollständig compliant (Nexova, Divisia)
LPS Treuhand: numbered 01/02/03 value system with SVG icons

designLanguage.editorial: 3-col divide-x hairlines, dot + H4 + muted body.
designLanguage.soft: Rounded icon circles, airy, vibrant accent.

sections/about.name: Section: about
sections/about.visual: Narrative prose on one side; a supporting portrait, a stats/telemetry card, or a small history timeline on the other. Human and credibility-building.
sections/about.placement: Mid-page. 12-col split (6/6, 8/4, 7/5). For owner-led firms the portrait dominates; for digital firms a stats card replaces the photo.
sections/about.states: On-scroll reveal; image may have an offset frame.
sections/about.animation: Prose fades up; portrait / stats-card slides in from the side; offset frame settles into place.
realWorld: Seal+Co: full-bleed alternating image+text editorial blocks
STG Zürich: heritage narrative replaces imagery

sections/profile.name: Section: profile
variants: hero + bio split + qualifications grid + pull-quote (ruerup)
sections/profile.visual: Owner / lead-person spotlight: large portrait split, bio, a numbered qualifications grid, and a personal pull-quote. Signals 'a real expert stands behind this'.
sections/profile.placement: Used by boutique/owner-led sites in place of (or before) a team grid. 5/7 portrait split, then qualification cards, then quote.
sections/profile.states: Portrait offset-frame; quote watermark fades in.
sections/profile.animation: Portrait scale + fade in; qualification cards stagger; quote watermark fades and parallax-drifts.
realWorld: Controva: named partner Damiana Campagna + 'I look forward to meeting you personally'
Rürup: hero + bio split + qualifications grid + pull-quote

designLanguage.swiss: Sharp portrait frame, signal-red credential badges, grotesk name.
designLanguage.editorial: Serif name, airy bio, numbered qualifications.
designLanguage.warm: Paper bg, rose accent on quote, ink-blue credentials.

sections/audience.name: Section: audience
sections/audience.visual: Who-we-serve cards: an icon or mono index label, a segment title, one line. Either deep industry pages or 3 persona cards.
sections/audience.placement: Mid-page (slot 6). Centered header + 3-col card grid; or a rotating persona carousel.
sections/audience.animation: Cards stagger-reveal; persona carousel auto-advances with cross-fade/slide (~5s) and arrow control.
realWorld: Nexova: 12 industry verticals (Startups, IT, Medical, NGOs, …)

designLanguage.warm: A/B/C cards with hairlines on paper.

sections/team.name: Section: team
sections/team.visual: People grid: monogram or photo avatar, name, role badge, short bio, optional tag chips. Real faces = trust currency.
sections/team.placement: Lower-mid page, or a compact teaser panel linking to a full team page. 3-col cards (digital) or 4/8 profile rows with bio (boutique).
sections/team.states: Hover reveals contact / social; avatar may desaturate→colour.
sections/team.animation: Avatars fade-up staggered; hover reveals contact/socials; monogram→photo cross-fade where available.
realWorld: Tureva: 3-col cards, monogram avatar + role badge
UdS: 4/8 profile rows + bio + tag chips

designLanguage.soft: Rounded cards, coloured monogram, role pill.
designLanguage.warm: Hairline profile rows, ink-blue role tag.

sections/process.name: Section: process
variants: clickable numbered cards w/ active ring 01-03 (boost)
sections/process.visual: 3 numbered steps (01–03): step number, title, one line; optional connector arrows or an active-step highlight ring.
sections/process.placement: Mid-page, after services/values. md:grid-cols-3; sometimes clickable to highlight the active step.
sections/process.states: Active step gets an accent ring; connectors animate.
sections/process.animation: Steps reveal left→right; connector lines draw (stroke-dashoffset); active step ring pulses on select.
realWorld: Boost: clickable numbered cards with active ring 01–03
Onboarding framing common: 'Onboarding → wir übernehmen → Echtzeit-Zahlen'

designLanguage.soft: Rounded step cards, active accent ring.

sections/pricing.name: Section: pricing
variants: 2-col cards w/ line items + startup-rate notes (boost)
sections/pricing.visual: Tier cards (name, description, price+period over a hairline, feature ul, CTA) with one 'recommended' card ringed/tinted; or a calculator that drives the highlight.
sections/pricing.placement: Lower-mid page (slot 11). lg:grid-cols-3 cards, recommended one centered/elevated; rate tables use 2-col line-item cards.
sections/pricing.states: Recommended card elevated; calculator slider re-highlights live; CTA hover per button spec.
sections/pricing.animation: Tier cards rise + fade staggered; recommended card holds a subtle scale/glow; calculator re-highlights the matching tier with a 200ms transition.
realWorld: Osome: 'ACCOUNTING from £71/m' with yellow cdx-marker highlight
Nexova: per-service 'ab CHF X' inline pricing

designLanguage.editorial: Bordered cards, serif price, restrained recommended tint.
designLanguage.soft: Rounded cards, vibrant recommended ring, pill CTA.

sections/partners.name: Section: partners
variants: certification logo strip (Treuhand Suisse, Expert Suisse, Swiss GAAP FER)
software partner badges (bexio / Abacus / KLARA / Xero)
sections/partners.visual: Certification / software / award logo strip — usually greyscale, equal-height. Small partner cards (category eyebrow + name + status pill) or a 12-cell award grid.
sections/partners.placement: Under the hero as a trust bar, or lower as a dedicated band before the footer.
sections/partners.states: Greyscale → colour on hover; optional marquee scroll.
sections/partners.animation: Logos fade-in or marquee auto-scroll loop; greyscale→colour on hover (~200ms).
realWorld: Run my Accounts: badge wall (Best of Swiss Web, Kununu, Top 100)
CH certs: TREUHAND SUISSE, EXPERTsuisse, RAB; software bexio/Abacus/Sage/DATEV

designLanguage.editorial: Hairline-framed small partner cards with key/value footer.
designLanguage.swiss: Sharp award grid + inverted CTA cell.

sections/faq.name: Section: faq
sections/faq.visual: Objection-handling Q&A — either static stacked cards or a single-open accordion (Plus/Minus). 5–8 entries.
sections/faq.placement: Late page (slot 13), before the final CTA. Centered stack max-w-3xl, or 2-col on wide layouts.
sections/faq.states: Accordion expands one panel at a time with height motion; chevron/plus rotates.
sections/faq.animation: Accordion body springs open with height + opacity (one panel at a time); chevron/plus rotates 200–300ms. soft: bouncier spring; swiss: linear snap.
realWorld: Canonical CH set: Was macht ein Treuhänder? · Kosten? · Vertrag? · wirklich digital? · Regionen? · Datenschutz?

designLanguage.any: Stacked Q/A cards or single-open accordion.

sections/quote.name: Section: quote
sections/quote.visual: Large italic display blockquote with attribution; often a giant faint quote-glyph watermark or a thin line motif behind/around it.
sections/quote.placement: Used as a philosophy beat between sections; top/bottom bordered band, centered.
sections/quote.states: Watermark fades/parallaxes; text reveals on scroll.
sections/quote.animation: Quote fades/slides up; giant watermark glyph parallax-drifts on scroll.
realWorld: Rürup: giant faint Quote watermark + italic philosophy line

designLanguage.warm: Centered blockquote + 'Strich' line motif on paper.

sections/testimonials.name: Section: testimonials
sections/testimonials.visual: Social proof: 2–4 named quote cards (quote, person, company, city — never anonymous) plus an aggregate metric/rating badge. Optional client photo and a linked case study.
sections/testimonials.placement: Slot 7 (briefing backbone) — right after values, as the credibility pivot; or as a carousel lower down. 2–3 col cards, or a rotating slider with arrows.
sections/testimonials.states: Carousel auto-rotates with arrows/dots; cards lift on hover; star rating renders inline.
sections/testimonials.animation: Carousel auto-rotates (cross-fade or slide, ~5–6s) with arrows/dots; cards lift on hover; star rating can animate its fill.
realWorld: Avalon: named quotes w/ company + city + case-study links

designLanguage.any: Named quote cards + aggregate rating badge.
designLanguage.soft: Rounded cards w/ avatar, soft shadow, carousel.
designLanguage.warm: Hairline quote cards on paper, rose accent mark.

sections/cta.name: Section: cta
sections/cta.visual: Conversion band: short headline + sub + one primary button; optional decorative corners, bloom/glow, or an inverted dark card for contrast.
sections/cta.placement: Repeated — at least once mid-page and again before the contact/footer. Centered band, or text-left + button-right teaser.
sections/cta.states: Button hover per spec; soft/dark variants may bloom or have a moving gradient.
sections/cta.animation: Band fades up on reveal. soft: nearest-CTA bloom/glow; dark/inverted variant: slow moving gradient; warm/editorial: static, snappy button hover only.
realWorld: Universal: 'Bereit? Termin buchen.' band before footer
Gruber Renger: lime CTA repeated 5+ times at section ends
Tureva: scroll-driven bloom on the nearest CTA

designLanguage.editorial: Inverted navy card, serif headline, blue button.
designLanguage.swiss: Sharp decorated band, signal-red solid button.
designLanguage.soft: Rounded band with lime bloom CTA.
designLanguage.warm: Paper band, ink-blue button, underline-anim link.

sections/contact.name: Section: contact
sections/contact.visual: Form on one side (name/email/phone/service-select/message, mono uppercase labels, required *), office info cards (address, phone, hours) + map on the other. Booking is offered as the primary path, form as fallback.
sections/contact.placement: Late page (slot 16), before footer. 12-col split (7/5 form+info, or 5/7 info+form); tabbed calendar/form variant for booking-led firms.
sections/contact.states: Inline validation; success/error banners; field focus adopts accent border.
sections/contact.animation: Form fields fade-up staggered; focus transitions border/ring 150ms; submit → spinner → success; banner slides + fades, auto-dismiss; map nodes pulse.

designLanguage.soft: Rounded inputs, pill submit, soft card.
designLanguage.warm: Hairline inputs on paper, ink submit.
designLanguage.swiss: Sharp inputs, signal submit, office cards + stylized map.

sections/map.name: Section: map
variants: abstract DE-CH SVG w/ animated nodes (ruerup)
sections/map.visual: Decorative line-map (abstract CH/DE-CH SVG or a custom city street map) with animated location nodes/labels — coverage made tangible.
sections/map.placement: Inside the contact block or as a standalone coverage section for multi-location firms.
sections/map.animation: Location nodes pulse/ping continuously; routes draw on reveal; tooltip fades on node hover.
realWorld: Nexova: interactive CH map, 8 cities (Bern, Basel, Zürich, …)
Rürup: abstract DE-CH SVG with animated nodes

designLanguage.swiss: Abstract DE-CH SVG, signal nodes, sharp.
designLanguage.warm: Hand-built Zürich street lines on paper.

navigation/sticky-translucent.name: Sticky translucent header
navigation/sticky-translucent.structure: sticky top-0 z-50, bg/90 backdrop-blur, bottom hairline, h-20, max-w-7xl; logo | center nav | right CTA
navigation/sticky-translucent.visual: Sticky top bar, h-20, bg/90 + backdrop-blur, bottom hairline, max-w-7xl. Logo (custom SVG or wordmark+subtitle) left · nav links center · CTA right.
navigation/sticky-translucent.placement: Pinned at top across all sites. Logo always left; primary CTA always top-right; links centered (soft/editorial) or right-clustered (corporate).
navigation/sticky-translucent.states: Shrinks/solidifies on scroll; blur intensifies; active link underline slides.
navigation/sticky-translucent.animation: On scroll past threshold: height shrinks + background solidifies + blur intensifies + shadow fades in (200–300ms).
realWorld: STG / Controva / Accounto / Fineac: NON-sticky, opaque (classic tier)

designLanguage.editorial: Wordmark + subtitle, thin hairline, serif-adjacent links.
designLanguage.swiss: Wordmark, sharp, pulse-dot status, grotesk links.
designLanguage.soft: Custom SVG logo, pill CTA, blur.
designLanguage.warm: Wordmark + hover-grow accent line, 1.5px signature bar above.

navigation/active-underline.name: Active-link underline indicator
navigation/active-underline.structure: desktop text links; active item gets sliding/animated underline bar
navigation/active-underline.visual: Active nav item carries a sliding/animated underline bar (layoutId spring) or a static accent underline.
navigation/active-underline.placement: Desktop link row; indicator tracks the current section/page.
navigation/active-underline.states: Spring-slides between items on route/scroll change.
navigation/active-underline.animation: Underline bar spring-slides between items (layoutId, ~300ms) on route/section change.

navigation/dropdown.name: Hover dropdown / mega menu
navigation/dropdown.structure: nav item reveals panel with title+subtext entries on hover
navigation/dropdown.visual: Hover dropdown / mega-menu: a panel of title+subtext entries (and sometimes columns) with a rotating ChevronDown.
navigation/dropdown.states: Reveals on hover/focus; chevron rotates; panel fades/slides.
navigation/dropdown.animation: Panel fade + slide-down (150–200ms) on hover/focus; chevron rotates 180°.
realWorld: bexio: two-tier audience nav (Unternehmer / Treuhänder) + dropdowns

navigation/lang-switch.name: Language switcher
navigation/lang-switch.structure: rounded-full segmented toggle or dropdown, active = filled chip
navigation/lang-switch.notes: BRIEFING §7 + §8.2 — PROMOTED TO CORE. Bilingual (DE/EN min, often +FR/IT) is table-stakes for CH; only 1 of 4 built sites has it.
navigation/lang-switch.visual: Segmented pill DE/EN(/FR/IT) toggle or a Globe menu; active = filled chip. CH region/locale where relevant.
navigation/lang-switch.placement: Top-right of nav (CH multilingual) or in the footer (intl region switch).
navigation/lang-switch.states: Active chip filled; switching swaps content locale.
navigation/lang-switch.animation: Active chip slides/cross-fades; content locale swaps with a quick fade.

navigation/mobile-drawer.name: Mobile menu drawer
variants: AnimatePresence height drawer + active left-border + full-width CTA (all)
navigation/mobile-drawer.structure: hamburger toggle → absolute animated panel with stacked links and CTA
navigation/mobile-drawer.visual: Hamburger → AnimatePresence height drawer: stacked links with an active left-border accent and a full-width CTA at the bottom.
navigation/mobile-drawer.placement: Mobile/tablet; toggled from the top-right hamburger.
navigation/mobile-drawer.states: Slides/expands; active link left-border; body scroll locks.
navigation/mobile-drawer.animation: Hamburger morphs to X; drawer height + opacity springs open (AnimatePresence); links stagger-in; body scroll locks.
realWorld: All built sites + most SaaS: animated drawer with full-width CTA

navigation/signature-bar.name: Top signature accent bar
navigation/signature-bar.structure: thin full-width colored bar fixed above nav
navigation/signature-bar.visual: A thin (≈1.5px) full-width coloured bar fixed above the header — a quiet brand signature.
navigation/signature-bar.placement: Very top of the page, above the nav.
navigation/signature-bar.animation: Static — or a one-time slide-in on first load.

footer/multicol.name: Multi-column footer
footer/multicol.structure: grid of 3–4 blocks: brand+tagline, sitemap links, offices/address, network/trust badges; bottom bar w/ dynamic year + legal triggers
footer/multicol.visual: 3–4 column grid: brand + tagline · sitemap · offices/address · network/trust badges; a bottom bar with the dynamic © year and legal triggers (Impressum/Datenschutz).
footer/multicol.placement: Page foot. Brand block left; link columns center; trust/social right; legal bar spans the bottom.
footer/multicol.animation: Columns fade-up on reveal; link hover underline ~150ms; © year is dynamic (no motion).
realWorld: All built sites: offices + sitemap + legal + © year

footer/extras.name: Footer accessories
footer/extras.structure: optional widgets embedded in footer columns
footer/extras.visual: Optional widgets embedded in footer columns: live local clock, language-capabilities box, social pills, SSL/UID/D&O trust badges.
footer/extras.placement: Within footer columns, secondary to the sitemap.
footer/extras.animation: Live clock ticks every second (optional digit cross-fade); social pills hover-lift; badges static.

buttons/primary-solid.name: Primary solid
buttons/primary-solid.structure: solid bg, uppercase tracked mono label, hover shift, often w/ arrow/send icon
buttons/primary-solid.visual: Solid accent fill, white (or ink-on-lime) label. Shape follows the look: pill on soft/SaaS, rounded-md on swiss/corporate, sharp on editorial/warm. Label often uppercase-tracked (mono) on editorial/swiss, title-case on soft; frequently carries a trailing arrow or send icon.
buttons/primary-solid.placement: The page's single most important action. Top-right of the nav ('Termin buchen' / 'Get started' / 'Book a demo') — near-universal across all 30 sites; first of the hero dual-CTA pair; repeated at section ends and in the final CTA band + footer.
buttons/primary-solid.states: Hover: brightness/elevation shift or arrow translate; active: slight press; focus: accent ring.
buttons/primary-solid.animation: Hover: 150–250ms brightness/elevation lift OR arrow translate-x ~4px; active: press scale 0.98; focus: ring fades in. soft adds spring + shadow bloom; warm is a snappy 200ms ease-out.
realWorld: Magic Heidi: teal pill 'Start Free' top-right + hero
Gruber Renger: lime rounded 'Erstgespräch buchen' repeated 5+×
Run my Accounts: navy pill 'Offerte' in nav

designLanguage.editorial: Navy fill, sharp/rounded-md, uppercase mono label + arrow.
designLanguage.swiss: Signal-red/anthracite fill, rounded-sm, tracked uppercase label.
designLanguage.soft: Lime/teal pill, title-case, soft shadow, optional bloom.
designLanguage.warm: Ink-blue fill, sharp, mono label, snappy hover.

buttons/outline.name: Outline / ghost (invert on hover)
buttons/outline.structure: transparent + border, hover fills with brand color
buttons/outline.visual: Transparent with a 1px accent/neutral border; inverts to a filled accent on hover. Same radius lane as the primary.
buttons/outline.placement: The hero's SECOND CTA (secondary to the solid primary), and inside cards/pricing where a softer action is needed.
buttons/outline.states: Hover fills with brand colour, label flips to contrast; focus ring.
buttons/outline.animation: Hover: ~200ms background-fill sweep + label colour flip to contrast; focus ring fades in.
realWorld: Magic Heidi: outlined 'Watch Demo →' beside solid primary
Karbon: outlined 'Take a Tour' beside 'Book a Demo'

designLanguage.editorial: Hairline border → navy fill, mono label.
designLanguage.warm: Sharp ink border → fill on paper.

buttons/link-arrow.name: Link with arrow
buttons/link-arrow.structure: text link, mono uppercase, arrow translates on group hover
buttons/link-arrow.visual: Text link, often mono uppercase, with a trailing ArrowRight and a thin bottom border; the arrow nudges right on hover.
buttons/link-arrow.placement: Card footers ('Mehr erfahren →', 'Read More'), service tiles, and inline 'learn more' affordances throughout sections.
buttons/link-arrow.states: Group-hover translates the arrow and may grow the underline.
buttons/link-arrow.animation: Group-hover translates the arrow ~4px (200ms) and may grow the bottom border.
realWorld: LPS Treuhand: underlined 'Learn more' text links instead of buttons
Pilot: arrow text-links repeated under features
London Accountants: 'Read More' on every service card

designLanguage.warm: Underline scales from left on hover.

buttons/underline-anim.name: Animated underline link
buttons/underline-anim.structure: ::after underline scales from left on hover
buttons/underline-anim.visual: Plain text link whose underline scales in from the left (::after scaleX) on hover — quiet, editorial.
buttons/underline-anim.placement: Nav links and inline prose links on boutique/editorial sites; secondary actions where a box would be too loud.
buttons/underline-anim.states: Underline grows left→right on hover, retracts on leave.
buttons/underline-anim.animation: ::after underline scaleX 0→1 from the left on hover (~200–250ms ease-out), retracts on leave. Quiet/editorial.

buttons/pill.name: Pill button
buttons/pill.visual: Fully rounded (rounded-full) solid or outline button — the default CTA shape of the SaaS/fintech tier.
buttons/pill.placement: Nav CTA and hero CTAs on soft-language sites; also used for filter/segment toggles and small badges.
buttons/pill.animation: Hover elevation/brightness 200ms; active press; soft variant may bloom.
realWorld: bexio, Accounto, Osome, Pilot, Karbon, Magic Heidi: pill CTAs throughout

buttons/bloom-cta.name: Bloom / glow interactive CTA
buttons/bloom-cta.structure: rounded-full, faded→full on activation, colored box-shadow bloom
buttons/bloom-cta.notes: Tied to a scroll observer that highlights nearest CTA.
buttons/bloom-cta.visual: Rounded-full button that starts slightly faded and blooms to full colour with a coloured box-shadow glow when it becomes the active/nearest CTA.
buttons/bloom-cta.placement: Primary CTAs on soft/vibrant sites where a scroll observer highlights whichever CTA is nearest viewport-center.
buttons/bloom-cta.states: Scroll-driven: fades→full + glow when active; hover deepens the bloom.
buttons/bloom-cta.animation: Scroll-driven fade→full + coloured box-shadow bloom when it becomes the active/nearest CTA; hover deepens the glow (spring, soft only).
realWorld: Tureva: .cta-btn-interactive lime bloom tied to scroll observer

buttons/tab.name: Tab button
buttons/tab.visual: Underline-tab toggle (border-b-2 on the active tab); flat, text-only.
buttons/tab.placement: Inside widgets — contact 'Calendar | Form' switcher, pricing monthly/yearly, service category filters.
buttons/tab.states: Active tab shows accent underline; inactive muted.
buttons/tab.animation: Active underline slides between tabs (layout spring ~300ms); panel cross-fades.

buttons/icon.name: Icon button
buttons/icon.visual: Square or round icon-only button (lucide icon): close X, refresh, restart, slot-select, carousel arrows.
buttons/icon.placement: Modal corners, carousel edges, form resets, mobile nav toggles.
buttons/icon.states: Hover bg/tint; focus ring; rotates for toggles.
buttons/icon.animation: Hover bg/tint fade; toggle icons rotate (chevron 180°, hamburger→X morph) 200–300ms.
realWorld: All built sites: carousel arrows, modal close, mobile hamburger

buttons/destructive.name: Destructive link
buttons/destructive.structure: red mono text link w/ Trash2/X
buttons/destructive.visual: Red mono text link with a Trash2/X icon — low-emphasis, never a filled box.
buttons/destructive.placement: Inside trackers/admin-ish widgets (delete a saved inquiry, cancel a booking).
buttons/destructive.animation: Hover deepens red (~150ms); optional shake on a destructive confirm.

buttons/card-as-button.name: Service nav card-as-button
buttons/card-as-button.structure: full card acts as button to a detail view
buttons/card-as-button.visual: A whole card (service/audience/team) is the click target — no inner button; an arrow or hover-border signals interactivity.
buttons/card-as-button.placement: Service and industry grids where each tile routes to a detail view.
buttons/card-as-button.states: Hover: border adopts accent / card lifts; arrow translates.
buttons/card-as-button.animation: Whole-card hover lift + shadow (soft) or border→accent (swiss/editorial), 200–300ms; inner arrow translates.
realWorld: bexio, Karbon, Osome, Warringsholz: clickable service tiles

cards/service-tile.name: Service tile
cards/service-tile.visual: Bordered or shadowed cell: icon (top-center or top-left) + title + 1-line summary + optional check-list + arrow link; CH digital variants add an inline 'ab CHF X' price line.
cards/service-tile.placement: Within the services grid — 2/3/4 across. Icon anchors the top; the arrow link/price sits at the bottom edge; the whole tile is commonly clickable.
cards/service-tile.states: Hover: border→accent (sharp looks) OR lift+shadow (soft looks); arrow nudges; icon tints.
cards/service-tile.animation: Staggered grid reveal; hover = lift+shadow (soft) or border→accent (swiss/editorial/warm) 200–300ms; icon tint + arrow nudge.
realWorld: Magic Heidi: 3-col, icon top, flat, clickable
Nexova: price line on each tile

designLanguage.editorial: Sharp hairline cell, icon-in-box, uppercase title.
designLanguage.soft: Rounded-2xl, soft shadow, hover-lift, vibrant icon.
designLanguage.warm: Sharp hairline tile on paper, ink arrow.

cards/feature-pillar.name: Large feature pillar w/ checklist
cards/feature-pillar.visual: Large card with a corner badge, a CheckCircle benefit checklist, and an outline CTA at the bottom — heavier than a service tile.
cards/feature-pillar.placement: 2-col 'big pillar' service layouts; each pillar is a self-contained offer with its own CTA.
cards/feature-pillar.animation: Fade-up reveal; hover subtle lift; CheckCircle items can stagger-check in; CTA inverts on hover.
realWorld: Rürup: 2 feature pillars w/ checklist + outline CTA
Magic Heidi/bexio: feature blocks with checklists

cards/stat.name: Stat / metric cell
cards/stat.visual: Big display number + mono/uppercase label + caption; bordered cell or borderless.
cards/stat.placement: Inside the stats band, 3–4 across, or embedded in an about-split as a 2×2 metric card.
cards/stat.animation: Number count-up on scroll-into-view; cell fade-up.

cards/telemetry.name: Telemetry / label-value card
cards/telemetry.visual: Label→value rows (STANDORT / FOKUS / GRÜNDUNG) with a thin accent bar — a 'data plate' look.
cards/telemetry.placement: Beside about/profile prose, or as a registry/credentials card.
cards/telemetry.states: Static; accent bar may animate width on reveal.
cards/telemetry.animation: Rows fade-in staggered; accent bar grows width on reveal.

designLanguage.warm: Hairline rows on paper, ink accent bar.

cards/pricing.name: Pricing card
cards/pricing.structure: name, desc, price block, feature ul, CTA
cards/pricing.visual: Tier card: name, description, price block over a hairline, feature ul with checks, CTA; the recommended tier gets a ring/tint or elevation.
cards/pricing.states: Recommended elevated; hover lift; calculator can re-highlight live.
cards/pricing.animation: Card rise + fade; recommended tier holds a persistent glow/scale; CTA hover per button spec.

designLanguage.soft: Rounded, vibrant recommended ring, pill CTA.

cards/partner.name: Partner / award card
cards/partner.structure: small bordered card w/ footer key/value
cards/partner.visual: Small bordered card: category eyebrow, partner/cert name, short desc, status pill; or a plain greyscale logo cell.
cards/partner.placement: Partners/trust grid; logo strips under hero or above footer.
cards/partner.animation: Fade-in or marquee; greyscale→colour on hover ~200ms.
realWorld: CH: TREUHAND SUISSE / EXPERTsuisse / RAB + bexio/Abacus

cards/audience.name: Audience / client-group card
cards/audience.visual: Icon circle (or mono index label) + segment title + one line; compact persona/industry card.
cards/audience.animation: Stagger reveal; hover tint/lift; carousel cross-fade between persona slides.

cards/team.name: Team card / profile row
cards/team.visual: Monogram or photo avatar + name + role badge + short bio; or a 4/8 profile row with bio + tag chips.
cards/team.placement: Team grid (3-col cards) or stacked profile rows; teaser panel links to full page.
cards/team.animation: Fade-up; hover reveals socials/contact; monogram↔photo cross-fade.

cards/office.name: Office / address card
cards/office.visual: Bordered card with an icon header and tel / mail / clock / address rows as links.
cards/office.placement: Contact section beside the form; one card per location.
cards/office.animation: Rows fade-in; row hover underline; subtle ripple on click-to-call/mail.
realWorld: Rürup/Tureva/UdS: office cards with contact rows

cards/callout.name: Highlight callout
cards/callout.visual: Accent-bordered panel (left-border or top-accent, or a rose/blue tint): icon + heading + body — used to emphasise one message.
cards/callout.placement: Inline within services/about to flag a key note, or as a highlight strip.
cards/callout.animation: Slide/fade in; accent border may draw; urgency variant can pulse gently.

cards/tag-chip.name: Mono tag / pill chip
cards/tag-chip.visual: Small bordered uppercase mono chip — certifications, registry numbers, language badges.
cards/tag-chip.placement: Under team names, in footers/trust rows, beside hero claims.
cards/tag-chip.animation: Fade-in staggered with its parent; optional hover tint.

cards/tracker-row.name: Inquiry / submission tracker row
cards/tracker-row.structure: bordered row in a list (localStorage records)
cards/tracker-row.visual: Bordered list row: id + date + status badge + action — a lightweight record line.
cards/tracker-row.placement: Inside engagement widgets (saved inquiries/bookings) persisted to localStorage.
cards/tracker-row.states: Status badge colour-codes; row hover; delete action.
cards/tracker-row.animation: New row slides in; status badge colour-transitions on change; delete collapses row height.

cards/result.name: Quiz / recommendation result card
cards/result.visual: Tinted recommendation card with a Sparkles icon, a verdict line, and CTAs — the payoff of a quiz/calculator.
cards/result.placement: End of an interactive widget flow.
cards/result.animation: Spring scale-in on reveal with a Sparkles pop; CTAs fade up after.
realWorld: UdS: quiz result card with verdict + CTAs

cards/banner.name: Success / error banner
cards/banner.structure: inline status banner w/ icon, auto-dismiss
cards/banner.visual: Inline status banner (emerald success / red error) with an icon; auto-dismiss.
cards/banner.animation: Slide-down + fade in; auto-dismiss fade-out after ~4–5s.
realWorld: All built sites: form success/error banners

forms/contact.name: Contact form
forms/contact.structure: 2-col paired rows + full-width textarea; mono uppercase labels; required *
forms/contact.visual: 2-col paired rows (name/email, phone/service-select) + full-width textarea; mono uppercase labels; required *; primary submit with send icon.
forms/contact.placement: Contact section, one side of a 7/5 or 5/7 split opposite the office info.
forms/contact.states: Inline validation, focus accent border, success/error banner on submit.
forms/contact.animation: Fields fade-up staggered; focus ring/border transition 150ms; submit → spinner → success swap; banner slide-fade.

designLanguage.any: Mono labels, accent focus, send icon.

forms/input.name: Input / textarea / select styles
forms/input.structure: consistent field styling driven by tokens (radius/border/focus)
forms/input.visual: Consistent field styling driven by tokens: border, focus-accent ring, radius per preset (sharp on swiss/warm, rounded on soft).
forms/input.states: Focus adopts accent border/ring; invalid → red border.
forms/input.animation: Focus border/ring transition ~150ms; floating label rises 200ms (if used); optional shake on invalid.

forms/validation.name: Client-side validation + feedback
variants: empty-check guard, error banner, success banner
forms/validation.visual: Required-field guard → inline error text + error/success banners with icons.
forms/validation.placement: On submit, adjacent to fields and at the form head.
forms/validation.states: Blocks submit on empty required; banner auto-dismisses.
forms/validation.animation: Inline error text fades in; banner slides down; success banner auto fade-out.

forms/persistence.name: localStorage persistence + tracker
forms/persistence.structure: submitted entries saved + listed with status badges
forms/persistence.visual: Submitted entries saved to localStorage and listed as tracker rows with status badges + delete.
forms/persistence.placement: Below the form or in a dedicated 'your inquiries' panel.
forms/persistence.states: Records persist across reloads; status can progress.
forms/persistence.animation: New tracker row slides in; delete collapses height.

forms/extras.name: Form extras
forms/extras.visual: Supplementary fields/notes: newsletter checkbox, consent/DSGVO note, partner-select, booking fields.
forms/extras.placement: Beneath the main fields; consent note near the submit.
forms/extras.states: Checkbox toggles; consent required for submit.
forms/extras.animation: Checkbox check-mark draws on toggle; consent note fades in.
realWorld: All built sites: DSGVO/nDSG consent note

widgets/modal.name: Modal / dialog (legal)
widgets/modal.structure: fixed overlay, scrollable dialog, close buttons
widgets/modal.visual: Fixed overlay with backdrop-blur, a scrollable scale-in dialog, and corner close buttons — used for Impressum/Datenschutz.
widgets/modal.placement: Triggered from footer legal links; centered overlay.
widgets/modal.states: Scale/fade-in; backdrop click + X close; body scroll lock.
widgets/modal.animation: Backdrop fade + dialog scale-in (0.96→1, 200–250ms); close reverses; body scroll lock.

widgets/accordion.name: Accordion (single-open)
widgets/accordion.structure: expandable list, one open at a time
widgets/accordion.visual: Single-open expandable list (Plus/Minus toggle) with height-animated body.
widgets/accordion.states: One panel open at a time; icon morphs; height springs.
widgets/accordion.animation: Body height + opacity spring open, one at a time; icon morphs 200–300ms.

widgets/tabs.name: Tabs / view-switcher / selector
widgets/tabs.visual: Toggle between panels — calendar/form tabs, or a sidebar selector + detail pane.
widgets/tabs.animation: Active tab underline slides; panel cross-fade or horizontal slide.

designLanguage.warm: Sidebar list + animated detail w/ accent bar.

widgets/booking.name: Booking wizard
widgets/booking.structure: multi-step appointment flow w/ slot grid + localStorage
widgets/booking.visual: 3-step wizard (date → form → success) with a slot grid; a mock Calendly flow.
widgets/booking.placement: Contact section as the primary 'Termin buchen' path.
widgets/booking.states: Stepper progress; slot select; success state persisted.
widgets/booking.animation: Stepper progress animates; slot-select highlight; success state scale-in.

widgets/calculator.name: Price calculator (slider)
widgets/calculator.structure: input range drives highlighted pricing card
widgets/calculator.visual: Range slider(s) → a highlighted recommended pricing card / live estimate.
widgets/calculator.placement: Pricing section or a standalone 'Preisrechner' — doubles as a lead-gen hook.
widgets/calculator.states: Slider drives a live re-highlight of the matching tier.
widgets/calculator.animation: Slider drag updates the value live; matching tier re-highlights with a 200ms transition + subtle scale.

widgets/quiz.name: Service quiz wizard
widgets/quiz.structure: stepper w/ progress bar → result card
widgets/quiz.visual: Multi-step stepper with a progress bar → a heuristic recommendation result card.
widgets/quiz.states: Step progress; computes a verdict; result scales in.
widgets/quiz.animation: Steps transition horizontally (slide); progress bar fills; result card scale-in (spring).

widgets/simulator.name: Animated simulator
widgets/simulator.structure: sliders compute SVG path + status verdict + celebration state
widgets/simulator.visual: Sliders compute an SVG sine-wave path + a status verdict with a celebration state — a signature 'wow' interaction.
widgets/simulator.placement: A hero-adjacent or mid-page showpiece; brand-specific.
widgets/simulator.states: Live SVG path recompute; verdict colour shifts; celebration on 'good' state.
widgets/simulator.animation: SVG sine-wave path morphs live as sliders move (rAF); verdict colour-shifts; celebration burst on the 'good' state.
realWorld: Magic Heidi: live QR-bill mockup as showpiece

widgets/scroll-cta.name: Scroll-driven CTA highlighter
widgets/scroll-cta.structure: passive scroll observer toggles active class on CTAs
widgets/scroll-cta.visual: A passive scroll observer that glows whichever CTA is nearest viewport-center.
widgets/scroll-cta.placement: Page-wide behaviour layered onto CTA buttons.
widgets/scroll-cta.states: Toggles an 'active/bloom' class as the user scrolls.
widgets/scroll-cta.animation: Passive observer toggles a bloom/active class as the nearest CTA enters viewport-centre (~300ms).

widgets/map-interactive.name: Interactive SVG map
widgets/map-interactive.structure: SVG with animated nodes and tooltips
widgets/map-interactive.visual: SVG map with hoverable/clickable location nodes and tooltips.
widgets/map-interactive.placement: Contact or coverage section for multi-location firms.
widgets/map-interactive.states: Nodes pulse; tooltip on hover; click scrolls to office.
widgets/map-interactive.animation: Nodes pulse/ping in a loop; hover scales the node + fades a tooltip; click smooth-scrolls to the office.

decoration/logo-mark.name: Custom SVG logo mark
decoration/logo-mark.structure: inline SVG brand mark in header/footer
decoration/logo-mark.visual: Inline SVG brand mark (infinity ∞, double-T monogram, custom glyph) in header + footer.
decoration/logo-mark.placement: Top-left of nav and in the footer brand block.
decoration/logo-mark.states: May animate on hover (stroke draw / subtle morph).
decoration/logo-mark.animation: Optional one-time stroke-draw/morph on load; subtle hover wiggle/morph; otherwise static.

decoration/divider.name: Branded section divider
decoration/divider.visual: Branded section divider: hairline + label/dot motif, or a custom line graphic ('Strich', flowing lines).
decoration/divider.placement: Between sections to pace the page.
decoration/divider.animation: Line draws / grows width on reveal (stroke-dashoffset or scaleX).

decoration/bg-animated.name: Animated background
decoration/bg-animated.structure: fixed/absolute decorative SVG/CSS layer behind content
decoration/bg-animated.visual: Fixed/absolute decorative layer behind content: flowing ribbons, masked grid, or faint gridlines.
decoration/bg-animated.animation: Continuous slow drift/parallax (ribbons flow, grid pans); pauses under prefers-reduced-motion.

decoration/accent-bar.name: Accent bar / hairline underline
decoration/accent-bar.visual: Short coloured bar (w-16 h-1 / w-8 h-[2px]) under eyebrows/headings.
decoration/accent-bar.placement: Directly beneath eyebrow labels and section headings.

decoration/pulse-dot.name: Pulse / ping status dot
decoration/pulse-dot.visual: Animated rounded-full dot (ping) — availability/status indicator beside an eyebrow.
decoration/pulse-dot.placement: In hero eyebrows ('Jetzt verfügbar'), nav status.

decoration/icon-box.name: Icon-in-bordered-box
decoration/icon-box.structure: lucide icon inside square bordered box
decoration/icon-box.visual: A lucide icon inside a ~40×40 bordered square box.
decoration/icon-box.placement: Atop service tiles and value items (editorial/swiss looks).
decoration/icon-box.animation: Hover tints box/icon (~200ms) and may scale slightly.
realWorld: Boost/Rürup: bordered icon boxes on service tiles

decoration/monogram.name: Monogram avatar block
decoration/monogram.structure: placeholder avatar w/ initials + role badge
decoration/monogram.visual: Initials on a solid colour block as a placeholder avatar, with a role badge.
decoration/monogram.placement: Team cards/rows when photos aren't available.
decoration/monogram.animation: Fade-in with its card; hover reveals an overlay.

decoration/portrait-frame.name: Decorative portrait frame
decoration/portrait-frame.structure: image card with offset border + caption overlay
decoration/portrait-frame.visual: Image card with an offset border frame and a credential caption overlay.
decoration/portrait-frame.animation: Offset frame slides into place on reveal; credential overlay fades in.
realWorld: Rürup: offset portrait frame + credential overlay

decoration/watermark.name: Giant quote watermark
decoration/watermark.visual: Oversized faint background glyph (e.g. a Quote mark) behind text.
decoration/watermark.animation: Parallax-drift on scroll; fades in behind the text.

decoration/map-art.name: Stylized line-map graphic
decoration/map-art.visual: Hand-built decorative SVG map (abstract DE-CH or Zürich streets).
decoration/map-art.animation: Lines draw on reveal; nodes animate (see widget.map-interactive).

decoration/icon-set.name: lucide-react icon system
decoration/icon-set.structure: consistent icon library across all sites
decoration/icon-set.visual: A single consistent icon library (lucide-react) across nav/service/contact.
decoration/icon-set.placement: Everywhere icons appear — kept to one family for cohesion.
decoration/icon-set.animation: No intrinsic motion — inherits its host element's animation.

layout/container.name: Container
layout/container.visual: Centered wrapper (max-w-7xl / 1200–1280px) with responsive gutter; inner max-w-4xl/3xl/2xl for text.

layout/section-rhythm.name: Section vertical rhythm
layout/section-rhythm.structure: consistent vertical spacing scale (from spacing tokens)
layout/section-rhythm.visual: Consistent vertical spacing scale (py-12/16/20/24/28; space-y-16..36 between sections).
layout/section-rhythm.animation: No intrinsic motion — governs spacing, not motion.
realWorld: Airy py-20/24 on premium looks; tighter py-12 on swiss

layout/grid-split.name: 12-col asymmetric splits
layout/grid-split.placement: Two-part sections where copy and a visual/info block sit side by side.
layout/grid-split.animation: Halves can reveal from opposite sides (slide-in left/right) on scroll-into-view.
realWorld: Hero/about/contact across all sites use 12-col splits

layout/hairline-grid.name: Zero-gap bordered+divided grid
layout/hairline-grid.structure: single bordered box subdivided by hairlines
layout/hairline-grid.visual: A single bordered box subdivided by divide-x/divide-y hairlines (zero-gap cells).
layout/hairline-grid.placement: Editorial services/values/stats where a 'ledger' look is wanted.
layout/hairline-grid.animation: Cells fade-in on reveal; hover tints an individual cell ~200ms.

layout/alt-bg.name: Alternating section backgrounds
layout/alt-bg.structure: section bg alternation for rhythm; each band bottom-bordered
layout/alt-bg.visual: Alternating section backgrounds (white ↔ gray/paper bands), each band bottom-bordered, for rhythm.
layout/alt-bg.placement: Across the whole page to separate beats.
layout/alt-bg.animation: Static bands; the content within each band reveals on enter.

layout/page-transition.name: Page / reveal transitions
layout/page-transition.placement: Between routed views and on section reveal.
layout/page-transition.states: Fade/slide on mount; cross-fade on view change.
layout/page-transition.animation: Route/view change cross-fades or slides (AnimatePresence); on-mount animate-fade-in. soft = spring; warm = 200ms ease-out; editorial/swiss = 300ms standard.

sections/blog-teaser.name: Blog / insights teaser
sections/blog-teaser.structure: section header + 3-col article cards (image, date, title, excerpt, read-more)
sections/blog-teaser.prevalence: 64% of scraped sites have a blog/news area; absent in built templates
sections/blog-teaser.visual: 3-card 'latest insights' row: image, date, title, excerpt, read-more; or a news/Merkblätter list.
sections/blog-teaser.placement: Late page, before the final CTA/footer.
sections/blog-teaser.states: Card hover lift; read-more arrow translate.
sections/blog-teaser.animation: Cards stagger fade-up; image zooms gently on hover; read-more arrow translates.
realWorld: 64% of scraped CH sites have a blog/news area

sections/trust-bar.name: Trust / certification & partner logo bar
sections/trust-bar.structure: horizontal strip of greyscale logos; often above footer or under hero
sections/trust-bar.prevalence: certifications cited by ~70% (eidg. Diplom) / 68% (RAB); built sites only used text
sections/trust-bar.visual: Horizontal strip of greyscale certification/software/award logos, equal height.
sections/trust-bar.placement: Directly under the hero, or as a band above the footer.
sections/trust-bar.animation: Logos fade-in or marquee auto-scroll loop; greyscale→colour on hover.

sections/jobs-teaser.name: Jobs / open positions teaser
sections/jobs-teaser.structure: list of positions or a recruiting CTA band
sections/jobs-teaser.visual: Open-roles list or a 'we're hiring' recruiting CTA band.
sections/jobs-teaser.placement: Late page or linked from nav ('Offene Stellen').
sections/jobs-teaser.states: Role rows hover; CTA per button spec.
sections/jobs-teaser.animation: Role rows fade-up; hover highlight; CTA per button spec.

widgets/client-portal-login.name: Client portal / login entry
widgets/client-portal-login.structure: prominent login link/button routing to a client portal
widgets/client-portal-login.prevalence: 16% of scraped sites expose a client portal/login
widgets/client-portal-login.visual: A prominent Login link/button (often outlined) routing to a client portal (e.g. AbaWeb).
widgets/client-portal-login.placement: Top-right of nav, separated from the marketing CTA.
widgets/client-portal-login.states: Hover per button spec; routes off to portal.
widgets/client-portal-login.animation: Hover per ghost-button (fill/tint); routes away to the portal (no in-page animation).

widgets/cookie-consent.name: Cookie consent banner
widgets/cookie-consent.structure: consent banner with accept/settings (legally required CH/EU)
widgets/cookie-consent.prevalence: explicit tooling on 6%, but required for all
widgets/cookie-consent.visual: Bottom consent banner or a preferences modal with accept/settings — legally required (nDSG/DSGVO).
widgets/cookie-consent.states: Dismiss persists choice; settings opens preferences.
widgets/cookie-consent.animation: Slides up from the bottom on first visit; dismiss slides out; settings opens a scale-in modal.
realWorld: Required for all CH/EU sites; explicit tooling on ~6% of scraped

forms/newsletter-signup.name: Newsletter signup
forms/newsletter-signup.structure: single email input + subscribe button, often in footer or after blog
forms/newsletter-signup.visual: Single email input + subscribe button (inline or footer).
forms/newsletter-signup.placement: Footer, or after the blog/insights section.
forms/newsletter-signup.animation: Field focus transition; submit → success swap; confirmation banner fades in.
